props.name: to
props.description: The target number to count up to.

props.name: from
props.description: The initial number from which the count starts.

props.name: direction
props.description: Direction of the count; can be "up" or "down". When this is set to "down", "from" and "to" become reversed, in order to count down.

props.name: delay
props.description: Delay in seconds before the counting starts.

props.name: duration
props.description: Duration of the count animation - based on the damping and stiffness configured inside the component.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class to apply to the component for additional styling.

props.name: startWhen
props.description: A boolean to control whether the animation should start when the component is in view. It basically works like an if statement, if this is true, the count will start.

props.name: separator
props.description: Character to use as a thousands separator in the displayed number.

props.name: onStart
props.description: Callback function that is called when the count animation starts.

props.name: onEnd
props.description: Callback function that is called when the count animation ends.
